3123080.name: Alien Weapon Test Grounds
3123080.description:
Test Alien Weapons and Survive Across Various Arenas!

Enter an exclusive test site spanning multiple extradimensional maps, each presenting unique challenges and environments. Equip a wide array of cutting-edge alien weapons and put them through their paces against relentless waves of rogue robots. Test, compare, and master the capabilities of each weapon as you navigate the dynamic landscapes of the test site. Feel the raw power of your arsenal and experience intense, fast-paced combat across every map!

Mission

Can you survive? The test starts easy, but the difficulty ramps up quickly. Every new wave brings faster, deadlier enemies. Use brief pauses between waves to scavenge for items and gear up for the next onslaught. How long can you last?

Score

Every enemy you destroy and wave you complete increases your score. You can earn bonus points for headshots, eliminating phantoms, and knocking robots off the map. Master these techniques to maximize your score and dominate the battlefield! But be cautious—using revives will reduce your score.

Dynamic Maps

Battle in ever-changing environments as the map shifts with each wave. Experience dark, eerie locations and brighter, scenic arenas. Find a map you love? Lock it in with the Portal and continue the fight in your favorite setting!

Key Features:

  • Alien Weaponry: Feel the impact of advanced alien weapon as you unleash devastation on your foes.

  • Endless Waves of Enemies: The challenge intensifies with every wave.

  • Dynamic Map Rotation: Enjoy a variety of environments, from dark, atmospheric locations to scenic landscapes.

  • Score System: Every shot counts! Conserve your health to maximize your score.

Do you have what it takes to master the ultimate arsenal and conquer the relentless onslaught? Good luck, and may your skills guide you to success!
